channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Liz Warren Endorses Senate Candidate, a Move That Could Backfire
American Dream Tied to ZIP Code: Where Starter Homes Are Still Affordable
item.description: Income needed for a typical starter home has risen about $35,000 since 2019, with regional recovery varying widely for first-time buyers.

item.title: Army Identifies Two Soldiers Killed in Jordan Attack; Trump Warns Iran
item.description: Two Army soldiers killed at Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan are identified as the first U.S. deaths since Iran violated Trump's peace agreement.

item.title: Florida GOP Rep. Donalds Proposes AI Data Center Bill to Lower Utility Costs
item.description: Byron Donalds, a Republican congressman running for Florida governor, on Monday announced legislation intended to prevent artificial intelligence data...
